subject: Removed ExtendedModuleReference Object
commit_message:
Removed ExtendedModuleReference Object

-Introduced ModuleReference with 2 prop name and revision
-Removed default constructor of ModuleReference

Issue-ID: CPS-592
Signed-off-by: sourabh_sourabh <sourabh.sourabh@est.tech>
Change-Id: I27a8a521f133c0773ef0aa0b9700ac42f6bc613b

Patch Set 2:

(3 comments)

I like the idea of having one class but there was a relevant reason for have the 2 versions:
mainly that when we got module references from  SDN-C (see DMIOperations) the namespace will NOT be populated due to a limitation of the underlying services (outside our scope)

1)
So i want to double check that 'identify new modules' still works OK, I think it wil because actual comparison is done using a sql query on just the 2 relevant fields) but we might need to change the output to ensure return namespace is stil null/blank

We might need to add something to the javadoc about the fact that the 'namespace' is ignored...
and also need to ensure that teh resulting namespace are not populated... 

2) Are any REST Api's affected by the Additional field or wil it simply be dropped from the json response?

Patch Set 2:
